opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The room is completely spinning, and I can't stop retching every time I try to move my head.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've been vomiting and dizzy for hours after a rough boat trip and can't keep any fluids down.

symptom_narrative.onset: 6 hours ago on a turbulent deep-sea fishing trip; still going 4h after getting off
symptom_narrative.character: nausea, retching/vomiting, dizziness worse with head movement, cold sweats
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: cold sweats, pallor, lots of saliva; NO weakness, numbness, slurred speech, severe headache or double vision; no fever/diarrhoea

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; ongoing fluid loss from vomiting; clear kinetic trigger (rough boat)

objective_data_offered.value: nausea/vertigo triggered by head movement after a rough boat trip; cold sweats and pallor
no weakness, numbness, slurred speech, severe headache or double vision
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported; full neuro exam not possible remotely
